ledger_window.data_source: postfiatd full-history archive node + chain-index.db deep crawl from Botfather vertex
ledger_window.note: Ledger range 571,858 to 1,926,688 — approximately 1.35 million ledgers spanning 47 days. Node currently reports complete_ledgers 571,583-1,927,673 (wider than our indexed range at the extremes).

title: Forensic Sybil Supersession Report
subtitle: Expanded investigation of the Post Fiat testnet sybil network
author: Permanent Upper Class

supersedes.earlier_claim: 73 bot wallets in one sybil cluster
supersedes.reason_superseded: Prior index captured only ~5% of the botfather's transaction history. Deep crawl from r9k51cJFVaYRST5vMUsdokiYcwdpQdUJGR revealed ~10x more bot-signature wallets than originally indexed.
supersedes.impact: The 73-bot count was directionally correct but numerically understated. The corrected count is 712 high-confidence bot wallets.

executive_summary.reward_leakage_basis: Direct infrastructure-to-bot transactions queried across all 7 infra wallets × 712 high-confidence bots: 0 matches. No indirect path identified within the 47-day visible window.
executive_summary.headline_finding: The bot network is operationally ISOLATED from the task reward economy. PFT under bot control did not originate from task rewards within the visible window.

balance_accounting.interpretation: The Botfather entered our visible window (ledger 571,172) already holding 88,219 PFT and having already issued 314,400 transactions. Its preceding tx at ledger 571,078 is below our node range. The origin of this pre-window capital is in ledger history BEFORE 571,078 — approximately ledger 1 to 571,077 — which is not available from our current archive node. This is the DEEP history gap.

funding_topology.direct_funders_self_originated_note: 676 of 706 direct funders received their original PFT from the botfather itself, indicating a circular cycling pattern rather than external capital inflow

behavioral_fingerprint.payment_amount_uniformity: 100.00 PFT x 73 seed transactions (100% uniform for the initial seed batch)
behavioral_fingerprint.conclusion: Mechanical distribution signature consistent with scripted capital distribution for sybil wallet activation

balance_at_earliest_visible_ledger.note: The Botfather already existed at 571,172 with 88,219 PFT balance and had already issued 314,400 transactions. Ledger 571,078 (where its PreviousTxnID resolves) is before our node accessible range, meaning the account was fully established before our earliest visible history.

first_visible_activity.destination_state_change: new account CREATED in this tx
first_visible_activity.significance: The first tx we can see is the Botfather creating and seeding a new wallet with 100 PFT. The Botfather was already a funding vertex when our visibility began.

HIGH.criteria: memo_tx_count = 0 AND tx_count >= 10 AND balance_drops BETWEEN 14000000 AND 16000000
HIGH.rationale: Zero memo participation + sustained transaction activity + uniform balance at XRPL minimum reserve (~15 PFT) is mathematically consistent with scripted wallet behavior and inconsistent with any plausible human use pattern

MEDIUM.rationale: Removes the balance constraint; catches bots that have been topped up or drained but retain the zero-memo signature

LOW.rationale: Any active wallet without memo participation; may include very new accounts or single-purpose wallets

source_query_examples.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accounts WHERE memo_tx_count = 0 AND tx_count >= 10 AND CAST(balance_drops AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 14000000 AND 16000000

source_query_examples.purpose: Verify zero direct infrastructure→bot reward transactions
source_query_examples.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transactions t JOIN accounts a ON t.destination = a.address WHERE t.account IN (<7 infra addresses>) AND a.memo_tx_count = 0 AND a.tx_count >= 10 AND CAST(t.amount_drops AS INTEGER) > 0 AND t.has_memo = 1

queries: SELECT SUM(CAST(amount_drops AS INTEGER))/1e6 FROM transactions WHERE destination = 'r9k51cJFVaYRST5vMUsdokiYcwdpQdUJGR' AND CAST(amount_drops AS INTEGER) > 0
SELECT SUM(CAST(amount_drops AS INTEGER))/1e6 FROM transactions WHERE account = 'r9k51cJFVaYRST5vMUsdokiYcwdpQdUJGR' AND CAST(amount_drops AS INTEGER) > 0

source_query_examples.purpose: Retrieve live balance from node (authoritative source)
Deep crawl to expand index from 175 to 846 active accounts

chain_of_custody.primary_source: postfiatd node (testnet-full-latest image) running on local infrastructure
chain_of_custody.acquisition_method: account_tx RPC with pagination + account_info for balance verification
chain_of_custody.data_integrity: All balance figures cross-verified against node account_info at validated ledger
chain_of_custody.transaction_immutability: Each cited tx_hash is immutable on the PFTL ledger and verifiable by any node operator

reward_leakage_verdict.verdict: NO LEAKAGE DETECTED WITHIN VISIBLE WINDOW
evidence: Query Q2 executed against all 7 infrastructure wallets × 712 high-confidence bots: 0 matching transactions
All reward payments from rJNwqDPKSk (airdrop), rGBKxoTcav (distribution), rKt4peDozp (distribution 2) verified to land only on wallets with non-zero memo counts (real contributors)
The bot network's funding is circular (bots funding bots) with external capital injected before the visible window
reward_leakage_verdict.limitation: Verdict is bounded by the 47-day visible window (2026-02-26 to 2026-04-14). Any reward leakage BEFORE 2026-02-26 is outside the scope of this analysis due to online_delete ledger retention on the archive node.
reward_leakage_verdict.implication: The network integrity guarantee holds for the period audited. The auth.json 'zero leaks' claim is now verified at the 712-bot scale, not just 73.

ledger_window_limit.description: postfiatd node uses online_delete retention; historical ledgers before ~1925705 are not queryable via account_tx unless the bot manually backfills from the NuDB archive. We rely on what was indexed during the active crawl window.
ledger_window_limit.impact: Approximately 88,279 PFT of pre-window external capital injected into the botfather is not traceable. Its original source is unknown.

classification_method_boundaries.false_positive_risk: Low — a real contributor with zero memos and exactly 15 PFT balance plus 10+ txns would need to be bulk-transferring PFT without any messaging, which is not observed among the 68 known contributors
classification_method_boundaries.false_negative_risk: Some bots may have slightly above-15 PFT balance from concurrent funding chains; these fall into the MEDIUM confidence band (26 additional accounts)
classification_method_boundaries.cluster_attribution: All 712 high-confidence bots are attributed to a single operator inference only. Multi-operator overlap is not proven.

temporal_scope.note: Behaviors outside this window are not captured.

operator_identity.note: The botfather is infrastructure (a funding vertex), not a person. No off-chain identity linkage is possible from public ledger data alone.

lens_dashboard.note: Dashboard will rebuild on next hourly cron with the expanded dataset. Current display is post-supersession.

version_history.scope: Initial supersession report with 712-bot corrected count and reward leakage re-verification
